databaseFailover.evidence: Backup restored from 2026-04-01T03:00:00Z, app healthy at T+1:00

redisLoss.evidence: Cache loss gracefully handled; warm-up in 15min

fullRebuild.evidence: git clone → npm install → prisma generate → build → deploy → health check

findingsAndGaps: RPO is 24h (1440 min), but target is ≤60 min for financial SaaS. Current backup cadence must increase to daily snapshots + continuous WAL archiving.
DR test is from 2026-04-01; next test due 2026-05-01. No automated DR drill on schedule.
Audit trail for financial operations incomplete: AUDIT_FINANCIAL_NO_TRAIL findings exist in checkout-payment and payment.service files.
Data deletion operations (Wallet, Order, Subscription tables) lack AuditLog writes: AUDIT_DELETION_NO_LOG findings.
recommendedActions: Enable PostgreSQL continuous WAL archiving on Railway for near-zero RPO.
Increase backup frequency from daily to hourly for database snapshots.
Audit all financial services (payment, wallet, ledger, commission) to ensure AuditLog.create() is inside $transaction().
Audit all delete operations on sensitive tables (Wallet, LedgerEntry, Order, Subscription, Customer, Product, Plan) to log via AuditLog before deletion.
Schedule automated DR drill every 30 days via CI/CD (stage environment only).
